name: Soft Lemonade Cookies
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Frozen lemonade concentrate (thawed and divided)
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 1:30
1. In a mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar.
2. Add eggs to the mixture.
3. Combine flour and baking soda in a separate bowl.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture alternately with 1/3 cup of lemonade concentrate.
5. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
6. Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls onto ungreased baking sheets.
7. Bake for 8 minutes.
8. Remove cookies from the oven and transfer them to wire racks to cool.
9. Brush remaining lemonade concentrate over the cooled cookies.
10. Sprinkle additional sugar on top of the cookies.
Yield: Approximately 6 dozen.
